title: Croatian Mincemeat Tagine
description: A hearty, slow-cooked tagine made with Croatian mincemeat, charred vegetables, and a blend of spices.

ingredients.name: Charred eggplant
ingredients.notes: charred on the grill or in the oven

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic, cumin, and paprika. Cook for 1 minute.
Add charred eggplant, Croatian mincemeat, and tagine spice blend. Stir to combine.
Add 1 cup of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes.
Stir in pomegranate seeds and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with additional pomegranate seeds and fresh herbs if desired.
